_note: Illustrative A2A Agent Card (PRD §13.3, Day 2). A2A is DEFAULT-OFF in this project: by default the Creative Director runs as an in-process ADK handoff, not a separate service. This card exists so the A2A capability is demonstrable, not theoretical (registered in Appendix D). Reserve it for a genuine deployment split (the simplicity guard, §6.3) — the CD is the natural first split (a stateless judge). Fields mirror the PRD §13.3 card verbatim; confirm the live A2A schema/field names against current docs at build time (§14.3).
name: Creative Director
description: Sole quality judge: Gate-0 Scroll Test + Gate-1 Compliance + post-render multimodal pass; returns a verdict, never edits.
